mapper.select: SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN_AT, CHECK_OUT_AT, STATUS, WORKED_MINUTES, BASE_WAGE, FINAL_WAGE, NOTE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM ATTENDANCE_RECORDS WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE_RECORDS SET CHECK_OUT_AT = #{checkOutAt}, WORKED_MINUTES = #{workedMinutes}, BASE_WAGE = #{baseWage}, FINAL_WAGE = #{finalWage}, STATUS = #{status} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ar.USER_ID AS userId, u.NAME AS userName, COALESCE(SUM(ar.WORKED_MINUTES), 0) AS totalWorkedMinutes, COALESCE(SUM(ar.FINAL_WAGE), 0) AS totalExpectedWage FROM ATTENDANCE_RECORDS ar JOIN USERS u ON u.ID = ar.USER_ID WHERE ar.WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND ar.WORK_DATE BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} GROUP BY ar.USER_ID, u.NAME ORDER BY totalExpectedWage DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE_RECORDS SET CHECK_IN_AT = #{checkInAt}, CHECK_OUT_AT = #{checkOutAt}, WORKED_MINUTES = #{workedMinutes}, BASE_WAGE = #{baseWage}, FINAL_WAGE = #{finalWage}, STATUS = #{status} WHERE ID = #{id}
